---
title: "STAT-302 Homepage"
author: David Gerard
---

[Syllabus](./syllabus.qmd)

- Chapter 0: R
  - [R and Data Frames](./01_r/01_r_intro.qmd)
  - [R Graphics](./01_r/01_ggplot.qmd)
  - [R Cheat Sheet](./01_r/01_r_cheatsheet.qmd)
- Review:
  - [Basic Statistics Review](./02_review/02_stat_202_review.qmd)
  - [Probability Review](./02_review/02_prob_review.qmd)
- Chapter 1:
  - [Causality and Generalizability](./03_ch1/03_ch1.qmd)
  - [Chapter 1 Worksheet](./03_ch1/03_worksheet.qmd)
- Chapter 2:
  - [Paired and Two-Sample t-Tests](./04_ch2/04_ch2.qmd)
  - [Chapter 2 Worksheet](./04_ch2/04_worksheet.qmd)
- Chapter 3:
  - [Assumptions of t-Tools](./05_ch3/05_ch3.qmd)
- Chapter 4: 
  - Nonparameterics
- Chapter 5:
  - One-way ANOVA
- Chapter 6:
  - Multiple Comparisons
- Chapters 7--8
  - Simple Linear Regression
- Chapters 9--11:
  - Multiple Regression
- Chapter 20:
  - Logistic Regression
